title: Just One Little Taste
lesson: Being brave enough to try a new healthy food can lead to a yummy surprise.
prompts: Place the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image at a cozy family dinner table in the evening. The person from the input image sits on the far left, facing the camera with a wary, unsure expression and the face fully visible, looking at a plate of colourful broccoli and carrots. On the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} sits with their own plate, smiling gently. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm indoor light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits on the far left gently pushing the plate of green broccoli away, facing the camera with a reluctant, frowning expression and the face fully visible. On the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} watches with patient encouragement. Warm dinner-table light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits on the far left, facing the camera with a curious, considering expression and the face fully visible, holding a small fork with one piece of broccoli. On the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} smiles warmly and gives an encouraging nod. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits alone in close view taking a brave first little bite of broccoli, eyes scrunched and head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible. Cozy dinner table, warm indoor light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits facing the camera with eyes wide open and a delighted, surprised smile, the face fully visible, realising the food is delicious. A plate of colourful vegetables in front of them, warm dinner light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits on the far left happily eating from the plate, facing the camera with a joyful smile and the face fully visible. On the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} claps softly, looking proud and pleased. Warm cozy kitchen, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
